title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Boat

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Boat
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Boat! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Boat:
Boat is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat!
